title: amygdalus elaeagrifolia subsp. leiocarpa
intro: Amygdalus elaeagrifolia subsp. leiocarpa, also known as Chinese hawthorn or Chinese maytree, is a plant species within the Rosaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to aid digestion, lower blood pressure, and reduce cholesterol levels. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting liver function, among others. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
